name: Egyptian Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour, baking powder, cinnamon, and cloves together; set aside.
2. Combine chocolate and coffee in a small saucepan. Cook over low heat until the chocolate is melted, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and cool to room temperature.
3. In a mixing bowl, cream butter and sugar until they are light and fluffy.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Beat in vanilla and chocolate mixture.
5. Gradually add dry ingredients alternately with milk to the creamed mixture, beating well after each addition.
6. Pour batter into two greased and waxed paper-lined 8-inch cake pans.
7. Bake in a preheated 350 degree F. oven for 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Cool in pans on racks for 10 minutes. Remove from pans; cool completely on racks.
8. To assemble the cake, place one cake layer on a serving plate. Spread with Cinnamon Whipped Cream. Top with second cake layer. Frost sides and top with remaining Cinnamon Whipped Cream. Refrigerate until serving time.
Cinnamon Whipped Cream:
1. Chill large mixing bowl and beaters.
2. Combine cream, sugar, vanilla, and cinnamon in an electric mixer set at high speed. Beat until soft peaks form and the mixture is thick enough to spread. Do not overbeat or you will have butter instead of whipped cream.
